public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as operations steward.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a operations steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of operations steward in and around Mimolot Book Tariff Office, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mimolot Book Tariff Office workable through the obligations of operations steward while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Mimolot.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Mimolot Book Tariff Office, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of operations steward visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ithra Spellward needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Mimolot Book Tariff Office.
Ithra Spellward can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Ithra Spellward communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mimolot Book Tariff Office: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
